channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress dumped outside my house, 2nd March
item.description:
Mattress dumped near Bike hanger outside my house since last week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ever increasing pile of rubbish, 2nd March
item.description:
This bin repeatedly has excessive rubbish dumped by it which then ends up all over the pavement. Please clean it up and put a much bigger bin in

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Dead pigeon, 2nd March
item.description:
There’s a dead pigeon, it’s been there for two days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Many potholes all across the road on St John’s Way, 2nd March
item.description:
These potholes have been getting increasingly bad over the past couple of months and now the road is getting to be almost unuseable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, St John's Way, Archway, Greater London

item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
The rubbish situation on Castlewood road is out of control. Bins are not used properly and rubbish is left on pavements even the day following collection.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Castlewood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
People leaving rubbish on our bin

item.description:

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd March
item.description:

item.title: Takeaway and building rubbish, 2nd March
item.description:
Late yesterday, a local business dumped all of its rubbish into these bins, I’m seeing rats. Can these be removed and investigated?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over Flowing bin, 2nd March
item.description:
Greenwich removed the bin on Plum Lane! Suggesting Dallin Rd Bin would be ok ! It's not! reinstate Bin on Plum lane and empty one on Dallin frequently. SORT it BRING BACK OUR PLUM LANE BIN...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dallin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 1st March
item.description:
Mattress and other waste dumped on Varcoe road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Varcoe Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The front garden is being used for parking a car and where the car enters clock house road it is dangerous., 1st March
item.description:
Several years ago building work was completed at the house on the junction of clock house road and croydon road. An entrance wide enough for a car was created from the pavement into the front garden, previously only a pedestrian gate, with the intention of parking a car. This was reported and Bromley advised that this should not happen as a car entering or exiting there is coming out or reversing at the point of a regular pedestrian crossing with island in the middle of the road, and where cars are coming across the Croydon road from the roundabout and needing to turn left into Clock house road. Any blockage there can cause further problems. For a long time this was adhered to and the gate remained closed with no car parking. Now it is being used for a car again and the risks remain the same as when it was originally reported - it is a very dangerous corner to have a car trying to reverse in or coming out of the space. Please can you look into this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cluster of potholes, 1st March
item.description:
Lots of potholes in the middle of the road, difficult to dry around

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stroud Green Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can this manhole cover pothole be marked up outside Andorra Ct please?, 1st March
item.description:
Please inspect and mark this up for Riney?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
